name: Zero Risk — Client Onboarding E2E v2 (Webhook: Deal Won)
description: E2E onboarding workflow triggered on new deal (GHL opportunity = Won). Auto-populates Client Brain (brand, ICP, competitive landscape, VoC). Co-creates success plan with client. Sets activation milestones + TTV targets. Handoff to Account Manager when health ≥ Yellow.

parameters.jsonBody:
={
  "contact_id": "{{ $('Validate Deal Data').item.json.primary_contact_id || ('stub-contact-' + Date.now()) }}",
  "event_title": {{ JSON.stringify('Kickoff Call: ' + ($('Validate Deal Data').item.json.client_name || 'new client')) }},
  "duration_minutes": 60,
  "scheduled_at": "{{ new Date(Date.now() + 3*24*60*60*1000).toISOString() }}",
  "description": "Welcome to Zero Risk! Success plan alignment + team intro."
}

={
  "contact_id": "{{ $('Validate Deal Data').item.json.primary_contact_id || ('stub-contact-' + Date.now()) }}",
  "title": {{ JSON.stringify('Account Manager Handoff: ' + ($('Validate Deal Data').item.json.client_name || 'new client')) }},
  "description": "Onboarding initiated. Client Brain auto-populated. Success plan drafted. Ready for AM ownership.",
  "due_date": "{{ new Date(Date.now() + 5*24*60*60*1000).toISOString().split('T')[0] }}",
  "priority": "high"
}

={{ JSON.stringify({ client_id: $('Validate Deal Data').item.json.client_id, client_id: $('Validate Deal Data').item.json.client_id, client_id: $('Validate Deal Data').item.json.client_id, name: $('Validate Deal Data').item.json.client_name, website: $('Validate Deal Data').item.json.website || $('Validate Deal Data').item.json.domain || null, industry: $('Validate Deal Data').item.json.industry || null, contact_email: $('Validate Deal Data').item.json.email || null, country: $('Validate Deal Data').item.json.country || "EC", language: "es", status: "onboarding", brand_book: {   content_text: $('Call Onboarding Specialist: Auto-Discovery').item.json.response || "",   auto_generated_from: "onboarding_e2e_v2_webhook" }, journey: "ONBOARD", journey_stage: "auto_discovery_complete", journey_status: "active", trigger_type: "webhook", trigger_source: $('Validate Deal Data').item.json.source || "deal_won_webhook", trigger_payload: { client_name: $('Validate Deal Data').item.json.client_name, contract_scope: $('Validate Deal Data').item.json.contract_scope }, metadata: { workflow: "Client Onboarding E2E v2", workflow_id: $workflow.id, execution_id: $execution.id }, logo_url: $('Validate Deal Data').item.json.client_logo_url, brand_colors: $('Validate Deal Data').item.json.client_brand_colors, brand_fonts: $('Validate Deal Data').item.json.client_brand_fonts }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ client_id: $('Persist Client to Supabase').item.json.client_id, journey: "ONBOARD", current_stage: "auto_discovery_complete", trigger_source: "onboarding_e2e_v2", metadata: {   onboarding_exec_id: $execution.id,   brand_book_id: $('Persist Client to Supabase').item.json.brand_book_id,   journey_state_id: $('Persist Client to Supabase').item.json.journey_state_id } }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ client_id: $('Validate Deal Data').item.json.client_id, scrape_summary: $('Call Onboarding Specialist: Auto-Discovery').item.json.response, caller: "onboarding-e2e-v2:" + $execution.id }) }}

nodes.name: Spell Check Pass (in-cascade)
nodes.notes: Gap 2 (2026-05-16) · marker only · the actual spell-check-corrector agent runs INSIDE /api/cascade/onboard between content-creator and editor-en-jefe (see src/lib/cascade-runner.ts SEQUENCE). This noOp documents the stage in n8n UI for operator visibility.
